description: 5. Get the status of a device
examples:
Command Example
symantec-mc-get-device-status uuid="C131C3D1-171B-4DA7-ADE2-AA736EA91540"
Context Example
{
"SymantecMC.Device": {
"StartDate": "2019-03-25T12:37:42",
"Errors": 0,
"Name": "192.168.1.207 - Blue Coat SG-VA Series",
name: symantec-mc-get-device-status

outputs.description: Device start date. SymantecMC.Device.MonitorState Device monitor state.
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: Device warning count. SymantecMC.Device.Errors Device error count.
outputs.name: SymantecMC.Device.Warnings
